description: Get ready to explore the city in these City Adventure shoes from timberland. The sleek design gives great comfort and grip and looks cool. Team this up with jeans and tees for a laidback look.Upper Bionic canvas uppers mixed with suede for rugged durability Suede reinforcements resists scuffs Padded collar and tongue for superior Fit and comfort Lace-ups for a snug fit Placement embroidered logo on the side for added style Midsole Anti-fatigue comfort footbed for all day support Outsole Gripstick rubber sole with horizontal grooves that give greater grip Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
